attack_chain.description: Attackers compromised an outdated Drupal site hosted outside AWS that the victim's friend used with the victim's AWS SES service.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: his old (outdated) Drupal site hosted on another resource, which didn’t have an opportunity to update and afterward got hacked

evidence_chunks.quote: his old (outdated) Drupal site hosted on another resource, which didn’t have an opportunity to update and afterward got hacked
his old (outdated) Drupal site hosted on another resource, which didn’t have an opportunity to update and afterward got hacked

attack_chain.description: Attackers discovered an AWS API key with maximum privileges stored within the compromised Drupal installation.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Somewhere there in the depths of hacked Drupal, there was an API key. After finding this key...

attack_chain.description: Attackers used the compromised AWS API key (with maximum privileges) to authenticate to the victim's AWS account.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: hacked through SES using a compromised API key with maximum privileges

evidence_chunks.quote: hacked through SES using a compromised API key with maximum privileges
hacked through SES using a compromised API key with maximum privileges

attack_chain.technique_name: Modify Cloud Compute Infrastructure: Create Cloud Instance
attack_chain.description: Attacker script automatically launched several dozen EC2 instances of the maximum/top configuration.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: the attackers’ script launched the creation of EC2 instances of the top configuration

evidence_chunks.quote: the attackers’ script launched the creation of EC2 instances of the top configuration
the attackers’ script launched the creation of EC2 instances of the top configuration

attack_chain.description: Attackers used the newly created EC2 instances to perform cryptocurrency mining, generating thousands of dollars in charges.

techniques.evidence_quote: old (outdated) Drupal site... afterward got hacked
compromised API key with maximum privileges
in the depths of hacked Drupal, there was an API key
compromised API key with maximum privileges

techniques.technique_name: Modify Cloud Compute Infrastructure: Create Cloud Instance
techniques.evidence_quote: attackers’ script launched the creation of EC2 instances of the top configuration

initial_access_vector: Compromise of an outdated Drupal site (outside AWS) that contained an AWS API key with maximum privileges, which attackers then used to access the victim's AWS account.
persistence_mechanism: None described; attackers relied on the compromised long-term API key.
privilege_escalation: Not required — the compromised API key already had maximum privileges.
